nasb.text: He lay down and slept under a juniper tree; and behold, there was an angel touching him, and he said to him, “Arise, eat.”

esv.text: And he lay down and slept under a broom tree. And behold, an angel touched him and said to him, “Arise and eat.”

cnv.text: 他躺在那棵羅騰樹下，睡著了。忽然有一位天使拍他，說：“起來，吃吧！”

ccb.text: 他躺在树下睡着了。有一位天使拍醒他，说：“起来吃东西吧。”
